steps.t: A stone on which to place Nimpheleg's beryl can be found in the deepest area of Buzun-ghâr. Nimpheleg believes that you can draw out and defeat the so…
Nimpheleg is at Lossathrod, the encampment in the upper reaches of Buzun-ghâr. You have drawn forth and defeated the source of the rot within Buzun-gh…
